block_02: What social media promotion methods will marketers choose in 2022? Here are the trends and sources that we think might help your affiliate marketing this year.
block_05: As always, quality content in video format converts best. When adding more video content into your strategy, note that the attention span has gotten shorter: videos are expected to be bite-size, well-edited, and captive. Instagram Reels, Stories, and TikTok videos will work best.
block_08: On-platform Facebook ad experiences (lead generation ads, Messenger ads, etc.) are becoming more effective. Facebook has learned the lessons of the 2021 pixel debacle and made its products more effective. You won't be able to advertise the IQ Option apps and website on Facebook directly, but it will work for your websites and landing pages.
block_11: If you provide valuable content, people would draw to you over time. By investing in community building, you connect much faster on deeper levels. The best way to build a community is to study your audience, answer its questions, and solve its problems.
block_14: Marketers predict a triumphant return of lifestyle blogging, only this time not on YouTube or Instagram stories but on TikTok. Interesting 1-3 min sketches about everyday life — that's what people will scroll on in 2022-2023.
block_18: The audience of audio and video podcasts is growing and marketers are placing a big bet on them. Podcast ads are more effective than video ads, and the audience has not yet developed ad resistance.
block_19: As for audio-based platforms like Clubhouse, many believe it’s dead, but this is only partly true.
